zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Lucy於1409年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Sir Walter Lucy23歲，母親Eleanor Archdeacon26歲。她於1435年與WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1461年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登享年52歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Lucy于1409年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Sir Walter Lucy23岁，母亲Eleanor Archdeacon26岁。她于1435年与WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1461年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登享年52岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Lucy was born in 1409, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Walter Lucy, was 23 and her mother, Eleanor Archdeacon, was 26. She married WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton in 1435, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1461, in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Lucy est née en 1409, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Lucy, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Archdeacon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton en 1435, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1461, à Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Lucy 1409 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter Lucy 23 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Archdeacon 26. Sie hat 1435 in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1461 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Middlesex, England begraben.

Lei sposato WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton nel 1435, nel Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Maud Lucyが1409年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Lucyは23歳，母Eleanor Archdeaconは26歳であった。1435年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルでWIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1461年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーロウデンで52歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Lucy(이)가 1409년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Lucy(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Archdeacon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해로우든에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Lucy nasceu em 1409, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Lucy, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Archdeacon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton em 1435, em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1461, em Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Lucy родилась в 1409 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Lucy было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Archdeacon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton в 1435 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлесекс, Англия.
